item.title: [Microsoft Ads] Evolving the Microsoft Advertising API Platform

item.title: [Google Ads] Google Ads Learning Period EXPLAINED: What You Need To Know [Inside Google Ads Episode 114]
item.description: The "learning period" is often treated like a ghost story in the world of Google Ads - something to be feared, to avoid at all costs. In episode 114 of the Inside Google Ads podcast, Google Ads Coach Jyll Saskin Gales aims to calm your anxiety, and bring some much needed TRUTH to all the learning my

item.title: [General] Boost Website Engagement: Trigger After 30 Seconds! #shorts
item.description: Don't let visitors bounce! Set up triggers to activate after they've spent 30 seconds on your site. Ensure they're engaged before any link clicks. Maximize your website's potential by keeping users interested. #WebsiteEngagement #MarketingTriggers #UserRetention #WebAnalytics

item.title: [Meta Ads] Does a Higher CPM Mean You Should Spend More?
item.description: Today's question is about CPM being double in the US versus the UK and whether that means you should allocate double the budget. CPM varies by country due to competition, but higher CPM doesn't automatically mean worse performance. Jon explains when to combine countries versus split them, how Meta b

item.title: [General] クリック単価高騰にどう向き合う？広告運用歴18年が教える個別クリック単価の使いどころ
item.description:

item.title: [General] How to Measure Brand Awareness: 12 Metrics, Survey Questions, and a Practical Dashboard
item.description: Brand awareness is one of the most important indicators of future demand, but it is also one of the easiest things to talk about vaguely. Many teams say they want “more awareness” when what they actually need is a clear way to measure whether more of the right people recognize the brand, remember

item.title: [General] Marketing KPIs: 25 Metrics to Track Leads, Revenue, and ROI
item.description: Marketing becomes much easier to manage when everyone agrees on what success actually looks like. That sounds obvious, but in practice, many teams still report on activity instead of outcomes. They celebrate more traffic, more impressions, more followers, or more email sends without proving wheth

item.title: [General] AI Visibility: How to Increase Brand Mentions and Citations in Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude
item.description: AI visibility is the ability of your brand, website, and content to appear in AI-generated answers when people ask questions in tools like Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and other answer engines. It is no longer enough to rank for a keyword and hope a user clicks through ten bl

item.title: [General] Google’s AI-Generated Landing Page Patent: What It Says, What It Does Not Say, and What Brands Should Do Now

item.title: [General] SEO Techniques That Still Matter in 2026: 17 Proven Ways to Improve Rankings, Traffic, and AI Search Visibility
item.description: Search engine optimization is still one of the most dependable ways to grow qualified traffic, improve visibility, and turn demand into revenue. What has changed is not the need for SEO, but the shape of modern search. A single query can now trigger standard organic listings, featured snippets, l

item.title: [Google Ads] Google Analytics Dashboard Guide: How to Build a GA4 Dashboard for Traffic, Conversions, Revenue, and SEO
item.description: A good Google Analytics dashboard does one job better than almost anything else in marketing: it turns too much data into a smaller set of decisions. That sounds simple, but in practice it is where most teams get stuck. Google Analytics 4 gives you a large volume of event-based data, multiple rep

item.title: [General] ChatGPT Ads Reach $100 Million Annualized Revenue as OpenAI Opens Self-Serve Access in April
item.description: OpenAI’s advertising business inside ChatGPT has crossed a milestone faster than most new ad products do. Within roughly six weeks of launching its U.S. pilot, the company says ChatGPT ads have passed $100 million in annualized revenue, with self-serve advertiser access expected to open in April.

item.description: 機能には自信がある。品質にもこだわっている。それなのに、思うように選んでもらえない。あるいは、一度は買ってもらえても、リピートにつながらない。 それは、商品のこだわりや開発の背景、作り手のストーリーや…
item.category: アナグラム ブログ

item.title: [Google Ads] Google Ads: Connect Everything for Max Conversions! #shorts
item.description: Connect Google Search Console, Business Profile, CRM, and Analytics to Google Ads for better conversion tracking. Give Google more data for optimal performance. #GoogleAds #DigitalMarketing #BusinessGrowth #SEO #MarketingTips

item.title: [General] KFC UK Pickle Puffer Jacket Giveaway: How It Works, What’s in the Pickle Mania Menu, and What Fans Need to Know
item.description: KFC UK has found a very specific way to make a limited-time menu launch harder to ignore. To promote its Pickle Mania range, the brand introduced the “Pickle Puffer,” a transparent puffer jacket filled with real pickle brine and sliced gherkins, complete with a built-in straw and pickle-shaped zi

item.title: [General] WhatsApp’s New Features Rolling Out Now: Easier Storage Cleanup, iPhone Multi-Account Support, Chat Transfer, Stickers, and AI Writing Help
item.description: WhatsApp has spent years refining the basics of messaging: reliable delivery, end-to-end encryption, voice notes, group chats, calls, Status, Channels, and business messaging. But the latest wave of updates is different in one important way. Instead of introducing one headline feature and moving

item.title: [Google Ads] Google Demand Gen New Features Explained: Veo Video, Creator Partnerships, YouTube Engagement Goals, Placements, Specs, and What Advertisers Should Do Next
item.description: Google has added another set of capabilities to Demand Gen, and the direction is clear: the company wants Demand Gen to become a more complete option for advertisers who need reach, creative flexibility, stronger audience signals, and clearer ways to measure impact across YouTube and other visual

item.title: [General] TikTok In-App Shopping Explained: What “Watch It. Love It. Want It.” Means for Brands, Retailers, and TikTok Shop
item.description: TikTok for Business has introduced a new commerce-led positioning, “Watch it. Love it. Want it.,” and the message is straightforward: the company wants brands to treat TikTok as more than an awareness platform. It wants marketers, merchants, and retail teams to see it as a place where discovery,

item.title: [General] What Meta Announced at IAB NewFronts 2026: Reels Trending Ads, Creator Discovery Tools, Threads Video Ads, and AI Creative Updates
item.description: Meta’s latest IAB NewFronts announcements were not a one-off collection of product updates. Taken together, they show where the company believes social advertising is heading next: toward culture-led placement, creator-centered discovery, more video inventory, and faster creative production power

item.title: [General] Google Search Live Expands Globally: What AI Mode Users in 200+ Countries Can Now Do With Voice and Camera
item.description: Google has expanded Search Live to every language and location where AI Mode is available, bringing the feature to users across more than 200 countries and territories. That is a meaningful change in how Google Search is being used. Instead of treating search as a box where people type a query, r

item.title: [General] Walmart Digital Price Tags Explained: How Electronic Shelf Labels Work, What Changes in Stores, and What Shoppers Should Know
item.description: Walmart is replacing paper shelf tags with digital shelf labels across its U.S. stores, and that change matters for more than store signage. On the surface, it looks like a simple operational update: small electronic displays instead of printed labels. In practice, it changes how a large retailer

item.title: [Google Ads] Google Ads Passkeys Explained: Setup Steps, Sensitive Actions, 7-Day Delay, and Security Requirements for Advertisers
item.description: Google Ads is adding passkey support to account access and, in some cases, to the approval of sensitive actions inside advertiser accounts. For advertisers, agencies, and in-house paid media teams, this matters for a simple reason: account security is no longer a side issue. It affects access, ap

item.title: [Google Ads] Google Ads Adds Veo: How Advertisers Can Turn Images Into 10-Second Video Ads in Asset Studio
item.description: For years, the bottleneck in Google Ads creative has not been media buying. It has been production. Brands can plan campaigns, segment audiences, map offers to funnel stages, and build measurement frameworks, but they still hit the same operational wall: they need more creative than they can prod

item.title: [Google Ads] Why Google Ads CPC Keeps Rising: What the Data Shows and How to Lower Cost Per Click Without Cutting Growth
item.description: Cost per click is rising in Google Ads for a simple reason: more advertisers are competing for a limited number of high-intent clicks, while Google’s search results pages are changing in ways that make those clicks harder to win. But that headline explanation is only part of the story. The real r

item.title: [General] Unlock More Sales: Target Leather Boots Effectively #shorts
item.description: Selling leather boots? Don't target broadly. Discover how targeting specific long-tail keywords like 'leather Chelsea boots' can dramatically lower click costs and boost profits. Optimize your ad strategy. #KeywordResearch #ECommerceTips #DigitalMarketing #SeoStrategy #PpcAdvertising

item.title: [Google Ads] The Branded Search Playbook: Defend Your Brand Without Killing ROI [Inside Google Ads Episode 113]
item.description: Should you be paying for ads when people are already searching for your business by name? This "brand tax" is one of the most debated topics in the Google Ads community, but the decision should be based on data, not a gut feeling. In episode 113 of the Inside Google Ads podcast, #1 Most Influential

item.title: [Google Ads] Google Ads: Master Keyword Match Types & Bidding #shorts
item.description: Start with exact match keywords, then evolve to phrase and broad match. Leverage conversion data with maximized conversions or target CPA bidding for optimal ad performance. #KeywordStrategy #GoogleAds #Bidding #DigitalMarketing

item.description: Learn more about our latest Demand Gen Drop and ways to maximize campaign performance in Demand Gen campaigns.
